hero.descMaterials: Filter and choose your stone. Price per m² is shown on each material.
hero.descCalculator: Enter measurements, choose edge profile, backsplash and cutouts/extras. Price updates live.

hero.title: Order your countertop online
hero.desc: Choose material, enter dimensions and get instant pricing. The quote is sent by email.

process.title: How it works – step by step

steps.title: Choose stone
steps.desc: Browse our materials and pick your favourite.

steps.title: Enter sizes & options
steps.desc: Fill in measurements and add your options.

steps.title: Quote is sent
steps.desc: We receive your request and you get a copy by email.

steps.title: Contact within 24h
steps.desc: We schedule a free on-site measurement.

steps.title: Free measurement
steps.desc: We visit and measure your project.

steps.title: Fixed price – all included
steps.desc: You get a clear quote with a fixed total price.

steps.title: Book installation
steps.desc: When the stone is ready, we book installation.

steps.title: Installation & 10-year warranty
steps.desc: You receive a warranty certificate (10 years).
